The '''''Mu''-class shuttle (Model 1)''' was a [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] long-range [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]].

==Characteristics==
It was 20 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long, required a crew of two, and carried 24 [[Soldier/Legends|troops]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-03-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 8: Scouts]]''
*<!-- 1997-XX-XX -->''[[Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook]]'' {{Imo}}
*<!-- 2010-04-20 -->''[[The Unknown Regions]]''
